Husband is having an ordinary Job
If Mars is combined with Ketu or if there is a combination
of Mars + Ketu +Moon the native will have an ordinary Job.
Husband will have more wives or more females in his tife
IfMars is having Venus, Mercury, Moon in 2nd or
51 h House to him the native will have many females in
his life.
Husband is lover of Fine Arts;
If Mars is having Venus, Moon, and Mercury in 2nd, 5'\
and 9th to him the native will be a lover of Fine Arts.
Wife's fortune from Planet Venus
Venus is wife. If Mars+ Jupiter are posited in 2nd house to
Venus the wife will be an erudite and also an experienced
woman. Extra-ordinary inteligence of the native is known by the
combination of Jupiter+ Mercury.

46 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Wife is of Falsehood & unworthy/unbecoming character
